description: Bottom-up component ablation for DynQueryWorldModel. Each experiment adds one novel component (DQE → TRP → DRF) while holding all others fixed. ActionFutureScorer is excluded throughout. use_motion_bias=0 for all rows to isolate each component cleanly.

_ablation_table.EXP-B: ablation_dqe       — DQE=✓ TRP=✗ DRF=✗  (DynamicQueryExtractor action-conditioning only)
_ablation_table.EXP-C: ablation_dqe_trp   — DQE=✓ TRP=✓ DRF=✗  (+ TemporalResidualPredictor query_wise)
_ablation_table.EXP-D: ablation_dqe_trp_drf — DQE=✓ TRP=✓ DRF=✓  (+ DynamicResidualFusion gate)

_reference_note: ablation_base is disabled (enabled=false). Its results come from dynquery_core_sweep::dq_baseline, which shares an identical hyperparameter configuration. Run the original sweep first, or copy its checkpoint/metrics before evaluating this sweep.

experiments.description: EXP-A: Performance floor. All components OFF. Identical to dynquery_core_sweep::dq_baseline — reuse that checkpoint and metrics.

_reuse_from.reason: Hyperparameters are byte-for-byte identical. No need to retrain.

experiments.description: EXP-B: +DynamicQueryExtractor only. Adds action-conditioned spatial mask (use_action_conditioned_mask=1) + lambda_mask_dynamic=0.1. Predictor stays linear_expand (TRP off). No dynamic gate (DRF off).
EXP-C: +TemporalResidualPredictor. Adds query_wise mode (per-query independent cross-attention + delta head) and lambda_query_delta_sparse=0.001 on top of EXP-B. No dynamic gate (DRF off).

EXP-D: +DynamicResidualFusion. Adds use_dynamic_residual_gate=1 (fuser_masks soft-union gates the pixel residual) on top of EXP-C. Full proposed model without ActionFutureScorer. NOTE: differs from dynquery_core_sweep::dq_core14_no_scorer by use_motion_bias=0 (here) vs 1 (there).
